appraisal_events.evidence: Au bout d'une heure il arrivait; ... je me sentais délivré de mes préoccupations. Je savais, que si elles étaient plus fortes que moi, il était plus fort qu'elles, ... vers lui qui avait à décider.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Saint-Loup as decisive, available despite difficulty, and stronger than his concerns; he implicitly delegates the authority to decide to him. This locally elevates Saint-Loup through the deference and effectiveness attributed to him.

status_effects.explanation: Saint-Loup gains a local position of authority: he is the one "who had to decide" and the attention of the narrator turns to him, which implies practical deference.
